name: Luxurious Vietnam Exploration Package 11 days
duration: Places:Ho Chi Minh City - Mekong Delta - Hoi An - Cam Thanh Village - Hanoi - Ninh Binh - Halong Bay
highlights: Explore the hidden gems of the Mekong Delta on a comfortable sampan trip.
Discover the ancient charm of Hoi An's lantern-lit streets and culinary secrets.
Admire the majestic landscapes of Halong Bay on an opulent overnight cruise.
Enjoy an exciting bike trip to Cam Thanh Village and gain hands-on farming skills like a real local.

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City Arrival - Luxury Dinner on Saigon River
itinerary.description: Upon arrival at Tan Son Nhat airport, our guide and driver will pick you up with a warm smile and drive to the city center for check-in at the hotel to relax for the next day's expedition. NOTE: As usual, the check-in time is 14:00; please book with your travel consultant for early check-in with an additional charge. In the evening, unwind with a luxurious dinner cruise on the Saigon River, where you can enjoy fine dining and live entertainment while admiring the illuminated city skyline. This elegant experience offers a perfect blend of delicious cuisine, cultural performances, and stunning w...

itinerary.title: Cai Be Princess Sampan Luxury Day Cruise to Mekong Delta
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast in a rare quiet space in Ho Chi Minh at your hotel. Our driver and guide will pick you up to start the Mekong Delta discovery. Arrival at Cai Be jetty for boarding, and staff welcomes with cold tower and refreshing drinks. After the briefing, the deluxe sampan starts sailing through the fantastic landscape of the Mekong Delta. Lost in peaceful Tan Phong Islet on short cycling, where you escape from the smell of traffic or smoke, just only the fragrant aroma of fruits and fresh nature

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City - Da Nang - Hoi An
itinerary.description:
Morning

Enjoy the last breakfast at Ho Chi Minh Hotel and your leisure time before transferring to Tan Son Nhat Airport for the flight to Da Nang. Arriving at Da Nang International Airport, a transfer awaits and takes you to your deluxe hotel in Hoi An. Then you have free time for the rest of the day; here are some recommended options to learn more about this charming town. Hoi An Motorbike Street Food Tour Half Day	FROM US $58 /pax
Teh Dar Show Ticket at Hoi An Lune Center	FROM US $30 /pax

itinerary.title: Life As A Farmer In Tra Que Village
itinerary.description:
Morning/Afternoon

Breakfast in the peaceful old town of Hoi An is a pure start to the trip right after. NOTE: You can choose to start the tour in the morning (from 08:30) or in the afternoon (from 14:30) 

Cycling from your stay through winding roads and green fields in the central countryside of Vietnam. Arrival at Tra Que organic farm to join gardening activities to learn farming skills you may not know before. Then, visit a local house and discover how locals traditionally make white rice and rice pancakes yourself in a cooking class with a local host. A lunch with specialties of the villa...

itinerary.title: Free Day In Hoi An
itinerary.description:
During the day, you can explore the town or join our optional activity. We recommend some ways to explore the beauty of Hoi An. You can choose one of the following optional tours

Cam Thanh Coconut Village & Lantern Making Half Day	FROM US $35 /pax
Tra Que Village by Bike & Cooking Class Half Day	FROM US $42 /pax
Authentic Hoi An - Cooking Class & Biking Full Day	FROM US $67 /pax
Bike to My Son Sanctuary from Hoi An Day Trip	FROM US $99 /pax
Cu Lao Cham Full Day Join Tour from Hoi An	FROM US $39 /pax

itinerary.title: Hoi An - Hanoi - Street Food Tour In
itinerary.description:
Morning

Savor the last breakfast in serenity Hoi An and transfer to Da Nang Airport to fly to Hanoi. You will be warmly welcomed by our guide and transferred to your hotel in Hanoi Old Quarter. Afternoon

This afternoon is for you to take a rest after a long flight. In the evening, embark on a culinary journey through the vibrant streets of Hanoi Old Quarter, tasting local specialties.

itinerary.title: Inside Hanoi On Jeep Half Day
itinerary.description:
Morning

After a full breakfast at the hotel, today is a unique exploration of Hanoi by Jeep. You can choose the timetable that suits you: 

Morning Tour: 08:00 - 12:30 (Lunch included at the end)

Afternoon Tour: 12:30 - 17:00 (Lunch included at the beginning)

Sunset & Night Tour: 17:00 - 21:30 (Dinner included at the end)

NOTE:The group tour size is between 1 and 6 people. Pick up at your hotel and meet our guide and driver for a safety briefing. The Jeep takes you through the backstreets, tiny alleyways, local homes, schools, and random markets where you can watch the city's lesser-known ...

itinerary.title: Ninh Binh: Hoa Lu - Tam Coc Full Day
itinerary.description:
Morning

Ready your energy for a full day of sightseeing at the majestic Ninh Binh, famous for a complex of the ancient capital and other verdant landscapes just 2 hours from Hanoi. Arrive at Tam Coc for a rowed boat trip through the lush Ngo Dong River and float your soul in the fresh air. Bamboo boat paddle deep within three big caves to view limestone karst formations, followed by a meandering excursion via rice fields and temples en route to and from the caves. Try the specialties of Ninh Binh for lunch in a local restaurant. Afternoon

Coming to the ancient capital of Vietnam, Hoa Lu, exi...

itinerary.title: Luxurious Overnight Cruise in Halong Bay & Seaplane Experience
itinerary.description:
Morning

Around 8:00, a luxury limousine will pick you up from your hotel in Hanoi’s Old Quarter and transfer you to Tuan Chau Pier, Halong Bay. Upon arrival, embark on a 25-minute seaplane tour to witness the breathtaking beauty of Halong Bay from above. As you soar over this UNESCO World Heritage Site, marvel at its stunning limestone karsts, hidden lagoons, and emerald waters. After landing, transfer to your luxury cruise, where the friendly staff will greet you and assist with a smooth check-in. Enjoy a refreshing welcome drink, listen to a brief safety introduction, and settle into your e...

itinerary.title: Halong Bay - Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

Recharge your body and mind among fresh air in Tai Chi Class, or simply capture all the clearest scenery of the morning on the bay in sight through your cabin. A light breakfast is ready at 07:00 before you continue discovering by kayaking, caving, or swimming in crystal clear waters. Return to the cruise around 10:00 to check out and delight in the last tasty meal while the cruise sails back to the port. Around noon, arrive at the pier. The captain and cruise crew say thank you and goodbye for joining in the ship journey

itinerary.title: Hanoi Departure
itinerary.description:
Morning

After flavoring your last breakfast, please process check out and feel free then our driver will transfer you to the airport for your departure flight. This is the end of your luxury trip to explore Vietnam. Hope to serve you again!

included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing accommodation at hotel, except overnight on train and homestay (if any)
All transport within Vietnam and Cambodia (including airport pick up & see off), as per itinerary
2 domestic flights Ho Chi Minh City – Da Nang and Da Nang – Hanoi
Meals as indicated in the program
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE

If you have any specific food requirement (vegetarian, vegan, food allergies, etc.) please inform us in advance, we will provide notices to our restaurants, tour guides and partners so they would be able to serve you the best.
